DP.562.0002:
...
This person seems to be occupied.
DP.562.0007:
You’re going to show me your Trainer
Case?\f
I’ll show you my Trainer Case as
well!
DP.562.0008:
Huh? I can’t seem to find my Trainer
Case.\f
Sorry about that!
Maybe next time.
DP.562.0009:
Thank you!
Please don’t be a stranger!\f
DP.562.0010: Would you like to do something else?
DP.562.0011:
Oh, that’s OK.
Next time will be fine.
DP.562.0012:
Huh? You want to give me your
[0119,0002]?
DP.562.0013:
Thanks, but no.
I can’t take that from you.\f
Maybe another time!
DP.562.0014:
Thank you!\f
Your [0119,0002]
was given to [0103,0000].
DP.562.0018:
[0119,0003] was
found in the ground!\f
[0103,0001] disengaged
the [0119,0003]!
DP.562.0019:
The wall is bulging slightly.
Try digging into it?
DP.562.0020:
Too bad!
Your Bag is full!
DP.562.0021:
Too bad!
Your Bag is full!
DP.562.0024:
I’ll let you see my Trainer Case.\f
May I see your Trainer Case?
DP.562.0025:
Oh, you’re busy? Sorry to bug you!
Maybe next time!
DP.562.0028:
Oh, right! You can have this
[0119,0002]!\f
I’d really like you to have it.
DP.562.0029:
Oh?
Do you have one already?
DP.562.0030:
Oh? You don’t have room for it in
your Bag.\f
OK, next time, then!
DP.562.0031:
OK, here you go!
Take care of it!\f
You received [0103,0000]’s
[0119,0002]!
DP.562.0035:
Would you like to make your
Secret Base here?
DP.562.0036: Would you like to move here?
DP.562.0037:
Leave the entrance open?
Or close it so you can decorate?
DP.562.0041:
It’s your own Secret Base.
Would you like to go in?
DP.562.0044: You entered your own Secret Base.
DP.562.0045:
Discovered a small cavern!
Would you like to go in?
DP.562.0047:
Open the door and exit the
Secret Base?
DP.562.0048:
DS Wireless Communications will be
launched.
DP.562.0051:
It’s an earthquake!\f
Escaped into the corridor
to avoid danger!
DP.562.0052:
Would you like to return to the
surface from where you entered?
DP.562.0057:
Someone is inside your Secret Base.
You may not move your base now.
DP.562.0058:
The [0119,0000] [0133,0001]
was buried right in front of you.
DP.562.0059:
Something was already buried in
the ground.
DP.562.0060: You can’t bury anything in a wall.
DP.562.0062:
Something pinged in the wall!
[0132,0000] confirmed!
DP.562.0065:
Too bad!
Your Bag is full!
DP.562.0066:
You can’t return to the surface
from a Secret Base.
DP.562.0067:
This appears to be [0103,0000]’s
Secret Base.\f
Take the Trainer’s Flag?
DP.562.0068:
Blocked the entrance to decorate
the Secret Base.
DP.562.0072:
I’m digging for Treasure right now.
Want to dig with me?\f
There just might be another dig spot
close by...
DP.562.0073:
You can’t put down a Trap inside
a Secret Base.
DP.562.0074:
You can’t drill holes inside
a Secret Base!
DP.562.0075:
Its size grew bigger by [0133,0000] since
it was buried!
DP.562.0078:
A Trap was found, but your Bag is
full. The Trap was left as is.
DP.562.0079:
The [0119,0000] was placed in
the Bag’s [FF00,0002]♈[FF00,0000]ITEMS Pocket.
DP.562.0080:
Your Bag is full. The [0119,0000]
couldn’t be put away.
DP.562.0081:
The [0119,0000] was placed in the
Bag’s [FF00,0002]♌[FF00,0000]MEDICINE Pocket.
DP.562.0083:
A Sphere was found, but your Bag is
full. The Sphere was left as is.
DP.562.0084:
You can’t bury a Sphere inside
a Secret Base.
DP.562.0085:
...\f
Oh? There is a note tucked inside
the Explorer Kit.\f
“Digging for Treasure and Spheres!”\f
I’ve put a sledgehammer and pickax
in your Explorer Kit!\f
Use them, and you’ll be able to touch
walls to dig out all sorts of stuff!\f
I’m sure you can dig them out before
the wall comes tumbling down!\f
You can do it!
Good luck, youngster!
DP.562.0086:
I can’t accept anything that
important!
DP.562.0087:
Thanks for the offer, but I’ll pass.
See you again tomorrow.
DP.562.0088:
...\f
The wall started to crumble.
It’s too dangerous to go in.
DP.562.0117:
It’s an alert from [0103,0000]!
“Hello! Nice to meet you!”
DP.562.0118:
It’s an alert from [0103,0000]!
“Good-bye! I’m going back up!”
DP.562.0119:
It’s an alert from [0103,0000]!
“Let’s go to the Union Room!”
DP.562.0120:
It’s an alert from [0103,0000]!
“Please come here!”
DP.562.0129:
What would you like to do with
this [0119,0002]?
DP.562.0131:
The [0119,0003] was set in
the ground.
DP.562.0136:
What’s that?
You wanted to ask me something?
DP.562.0138:
Yeah, I guess I have an answer.\f
What would your answer be?
DP.562.0141:
Oh, really?
[011E,0005]?\f
Well, for me...
[011E,0006]!\f
...Oh!
It’s the same answer!\f
DP.562.0143:
Hi, may I ask you a question?\f
Let’s see...\f
DP.562.0145:
Oh, don’t worry! You don’t have to
answer if you don’t want to.\f
DP.562.0146:
You’ve decided?\f
Well, let me see...
If it were me...
DP.562.0147:
[011E,0005] would be
my answer, I guess.\f
What did you choose?\f
...
[011E,0006]! OK!\f
DP.562.0148:
[011E,0005] would be
my answer, I guess.\f
What did you choose?\f
...
[011E,0006]! OK!\f
Oh, right.
It’s the same as me!\f
DP.562.0150:
Thanks for answering!\f
I hope to see you around!\f
DP.562.0155:
Pardon me?
You wanted to ask me something?
DP.562.0157:
Yes, I’ve decided!\f
If it were you, what would you
choose?
DP.562.0158:
I don’t know...
I can’t really decide.\f
DP.562.0159:
Is that right?
[011E,0005]?\f
My answer would be...
[011E,0006]!\f
DP.562.0160:
Is that right?
[011E,0005]?\f
My answer would be...
[011E,0006]!\f
...Oh!
It’s the same answer!\f
DP.562.0162:
Hi, may I ask you a question?\f
Let’s see...\f
DP.562.0163:
How’s this? [011D,0005]!
What’s your choice out of these?
DP.562.0164:
Not to worry! You don’t have to
answer if you don’t want to.\f
DP.562.0165:
You’ve decided?\f
Well, let me think...
If it were me...
DP.562.0166:
[011E,0005], maybe?\f
What did you choose?\f
...
[011E,0006]! OK!\f
DP.562.0167:
[011E,0005], maybe?\f
What did you choose?\f
...
[011E,0006]! OK!\f
Oh, right.
It’s the same as me!\f
DP.562.0169:
Thanks for answering!\f
I hope to see you around!\f
